description_long: This is a large, cylindrical industrial barrel with a muted purple color and a matte finish. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement rings, one near the top and one near the bottom, providing structural integrity. The top surface is flat with two circular, raised access ports, likely for filling and emptying contents, and a smaller cap. One side of the barrel displays a partially torn, faded label with remnants of blue and white coloration, suggesting prior use or repurposing. The surface appears hard and slightly rough, with minor scuffs and wear visible, indicating outdoor or heavy-duty use. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of metal, suitable for storing liquids or bulk materials in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, purple industrial barrel with two reinforcement rings, a flat lid with access ports, and a partially torn label on one side. The surface is hard, matte, and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the torn blue-and-white label and both reinforcement rings clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the label barely visible on the left edge and a clear view of the flat lid and reinforcement rings.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible label, showing the two access ports on the lid and the clean, uninterrupted barrel surface.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the lid's access ports and the smooth, label-free side of the barrel.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: integrated steel reinforcement rings at top and bottom
